name: product-management
description: Product management as a distinct discipline from project management. One skill — product-management-product-manager — grounded in Melissa Perri's Escaping the Build Trap (2018), with cross-references to Reinertsen's Principles of Product Development Flow and Gothelf's Lean vs Agile vs Design Thinking. Covers product strategy (Vision → Strategic Intents → Product Initiatives → Options), the Product Kata, outcomes vs. outputs, product discovery, and the project-to-product organizational shift. One template (Product Strategy). Will grow with skills for product discovery, product analytics, product operations, and product leadership.
